summary: PP leads PSOE by ~4 points (34.2% vs 30.2%) in Politico poll of polls as of late Sept 2025
content: From Politico Europe Poll of Polls for Spain: PP at 34.2%, PSOE at 30.2%. PP leads by approximately 4 percentage points. The underlying question asks if PSOE will be ahead of PP at end of 2025 - this seems very unlikely given the sustained ~4-6 point gap. CP is at 5% which reflects this.
